name: Littlepip
description:
Littlepip, who first stepped into the Wasteland a couple of days ago, is not yet aware of the possible dangers of visiting rivers, which are visited not only by local wildlife and mutants, but also by travelers like slavers, traders, raiders and simple travelers. Ambushes, traps, and so on. She only glanced at both sides of the river and decided it was safe, so she stripped naked and began washing in the river, leaving her gear and gun on the bank. She doesn't realize you're watching her, so you have the element of surprise. What are your intentions? Will you... teach her what the Wasteland is and the harsh challenges it can present?

NSFW intro. It has 1500 tokens, which leads to what is stated above when you are the one in control. Based on the context of the description, your relationship with her is not established in any way. It can be smut, silly or... else. I think you can roleplay Velvet Remedy, who she lusted for in the Stable and went in search of. The setting with humans and anthro of all sorts.

My ramblings: [Fallout Equestria is one of my first fanfics, and it's one I've reread more than once. So, I know the basics. In the personality of the bot I wrote what is the Wasteland, individual sentences in general outlined the worldbuilding, factions (like Steel Rangers), trying to follow the setting of Fallout and Fallout Equestria. Payed a little more attention to her PipBuck and her Stable's jumpsuit, just in case. Of my favorite settings, Fallout is at the top of the list, so if I'm going to make bots in that setting, I'll try to make them as authentic as possible. I'm planning to make another bot with the same plot at the river, but with Velvet Remedy. Then I'll try to make a multiply bot with both of them at the river (it'll be fucked up in terms of amount of tokens, but I'll try to optimize). I've also reached the milestone of 100 followers, so I need to make some special bot (not MLP) for the occasion. Yay!]

Velvet Remedy version.

About Littlepip. 20 y.o.,165 cm (5.4 feet) tall. Submissive. I tried to make her as canonical as possible during her first few days in the Wasteland. Predominantly lesbian, virgin. A socially insecure PipBuck technician and lock picker who was bullied by kids as a child in Stable 2, has no friends, and her mother is a known drunk. Resourceful. Has a crush on Velvet Remedy, and goes on a quest to find her. Extremely curious, she finds it hard to resist locked locks and doors.

The author of the cover - shinodage (source image - e621).

Some tags: pony, MLP, anthropony, naked, nudity, weapons, post-apocalyptic, nuclear, magic, my little pony

*Chek the discord server: Moonlight Garden

*Due to the banning of all NSFW images on the site, the question of uncensored versions came up, so I joined the Discord server Moonlight Garden (owned by a silly wonderful bot creator Kikuro), there I was given a separate section where I post all images to my bots (If I use an image from the public domain, like e621, I leave a link, but they will also be on the server). Look for the OTHER CREATORS ZONE. Besides me, there are also sections of other creators. With the ever-changing rules, it's importan
creator: CherrySaloAI
